## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `sshenc ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Environment

- macOS version: (e.g., 14.4)
- Hardware: (e.g., M1 MacBook Pro, Intel Mac mini)
- Rust version: (`rustc --version`)
- sshenc version: (`sshenc --version`)
- OpenSSH version: (`ssh -V`)
